name: the black horse
description:
"The Black Horse

When the Lamb opened the third seal, I heard the third living creature say, "Come and see!" I looked, and there before me was a black horse! Its rider was holding a pair of scales in his hand. Then I heard what sounded like a voice among the four living creatures, saying, "A quart of wheat for a denarius, and three quarts of barley for a denarius, and do not damage the oil and the wine!" (Revelation 6:5-6)"

THEME: sixteen tons (Tennessee Ernie Ford)

Authors notes: part three, thy have released pestilence and war on the earth. now thy has released famine. oh and this isn't like the 'traditional' like locusts and stuff, this is the biblical one. which is basically is just really high prices for regular needs like food. but I'm still adding the locusts as a part of the horse itself.
creator: annoyer
